title: spilotantha ova-avis
intro: Spilotantha ova-avis, also known as Spilanthes, is a flowering plant species commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate saliva production and act as a natural expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce the severity of colds and flu. Spilanthes can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
